CustomField.description: Field to check the orderability of the product
CustomField.formula: if(NATT_Core__c==true,true,if((NATT_Sales_Code__c=='S01'|| NATT_Sales_Code__c=='SB1'),if (ISPICKVAL( NATT_SignalCode__c, "NLO"),if (ISPICKVAL( NAC_Stocking_Type_UTC__c,"O"),true,false),ISPICKVAL( NATT_SignalCode__c, "S2") || ISPICKVAL( NATT_SignalCode__c, "PRC") || ISPICKVAL( NATT_SignalCode__c, "FIN") || ISPICKVAL( NATT_SignalCode__c, "BY2")),true))
CustomField.label: NAOCAP Not Orderable ATL
